---
title: "\'World, The\' by C. M. Yonge"
---

## \'World, The\' by C. M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 3:9 (April 1893) 65-7

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
